title: Resprited
description: A Resource Pack which aims to make the look and feel of Minecraft appear more appealing to the eyes.
body:
![resprited title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40f1e45b47a7dbd9e001889ee27efb83148c0865.png)

**Resprited** is a Resource Pack which aims to give a **new** look to Minecraft while still keeping its core feeling we all know and love.

It does this by tackling **multiple areas** of the game we can observe, for example blocks, items, entities and much more.

After a long time working on this I've finally decided to publish a public **Early Release** for everybody to enjoy while I work on the missing parts.

Have a nice one playing. 🎉


Note: As this pack is in beta some textures are subject to change over time. 

Please give credits if you show/use this rp in any public content 🙏
